name: Calhoun County Bank, Inc.
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank headquartered in Grantsville, WV, offering checking, savings, lending, and digital banking services with local market focus.
description_long:
Calhoun County Bank, Inc. is a community bank based in Grantsville, West Virginia, operating as an FDIC-insured institution backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government. The bank emphasizes its commitment to local communities, shareholders, customers, and employees through a traditional community banking model rather than national chain operations.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of deposit products including checking accounts, savings accounts, CDs, and IRAs. On the lending side, they provide auto loans, installment loans, mortgages, and home equity lines of credit. Digital services include online banking, bill pay, e-delivery, mobile banking apps (available for iPhone and Android), and telephone banking. Customers can apply for consumer loans and deposit accounts online, and make loan payments or deposits through their online portal. The bank also provides debit card services, surcharge-free ATM access, and financial calculators.

Calhoun County Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on personalized community banking. Leadership explicitly states "We know our customers and continually look out for their best interest in all transactions." The bank promotes local decision-making, employee volunteerism in communities, and offers internship programs. They provide modern technology services while maintaining a relationship-based banking approach, positioning themselves as an alternative to larger national institutions.

The bank operates from limited branch locations in the Grantsville, WV area and appears to be a smaller regional institution. While they offer competitive modern banking services, potential customers in other regions would not have local branch access. The website lacks detailed information about specific interest rates, fee structures (though a fee schedule exists), loan terms, or specific product differentiators, requiring customers to contact the bank directly for detailed pricing.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) and Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with U.S. Government backing for deposit protection
Online loan and deposit applications available 24/7 without branch visits
Mobile banking apps available for both iPhone and Android devices
Surcharge-free ATM network access for customers
Comprehensive lending options including auto, installment, mortgage, and home equity products
Online bill pay and e-delivery services for digital account management
Community-focused mission with local decision-making and employee involvement
Dividend income available to shareholders through semi-annual payments
cons: Limited branch network restricted to Grantsville, WV area with no apparent nationwide expansion
Website does not display specific interest rates, APRs, or fee amounts, requiring direct customer contact
Smaller regional bank may have fewer resources or product options compared to national competitors
Only accepts checks or debit cards for online payments, excluding other payment methods
Limited information available about mortgage products, refinancing options, or loan approval criteria
best_for: Residents of Grantsville, WV and surrounding Calhoun County seeking personalized community banking relationships
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured savings and relationship-based service over large national bank operations
Local homebuyers and borrowers seeking mortgages and home equity lines of credit from community lenders
Business owners and professionals in West Virginia seeking local banking partnerships with relationship managers
diagnosis: Calhoun County Bank is best suited for West Virginia residents in the Grantsville area seeking traditional community banking with modern digital conveniences and personalized service. The primary limitation is geographic—this is a regional bank without national branch access, making it unsuitable for customers outside its service territory or those requiring multi-state banking convenience.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
